name: radarr
description: Search, add, and monitor movies (and collections) in Radarr via its REST API. Check the download queue, quality profiles, and root folders. Skills-only, no MCP server required.

interface.longDescription: Search, add, and monitor movies (and collections) in Radarr via its REST API. Check the download queue, quality profiles, and root folders. Skills-only, no MCP server required.
defaultPrompt: Is Dune in my Radarr library?
Add all the Lord of the Rings movies.
